text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: It feels like ancient history now...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: "I look forward to hearing you sing<n>one day." Aw...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(I don't receive nearly as many fan<n>letters as I did
after my debut, but...)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: (There are still people out there<n>rooting for me.)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...The moon's so bright today. Some<n>of the stars
have faded.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Haha, what am I doing? As if I could<n>ever reach
them...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: (Wait, that voice...)

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text: Can't believe I lost again... Sniffle. Ihate this.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
I was going to win... and sing my<n>thanks to them...
Today was<n>supposed to be the day!

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text: Why... why can't I just—

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen her like that before.<n>So even she
cries sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(Please, if there's anyone listening up<n>there, don't
let her tears be shed in<n>vain.)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(When she wins, I'll be cheering from<n>the front
row. I'll scream until my<n>throat goes dry.)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(Because if she just had a chance, I<n>know it'd be
a magical concert like no<n>other...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More and more people know about<n>the Grand
Concert now. Our efforts<n>must be paying off.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
We hope you'll continue to help us<n>make the
Grand Concert a reality!

text_block_list.name: Man in Suit
text_block_list.text: Sure thing. I'm rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Falco, there you are! Is this about that<n>Grand
Concert?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we want to pitch in too! We<n>actually stopped
by your concert the<n>other day, and it made us
want to<n>join.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Really?! Welcome aboard! You're one<n>of us now!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, you never miss a beat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We've had more students join our<n>cause, too.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
...So those are the people going on<n>about this
"Grand Concert"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student walks off before we get<n>a chance to
talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We let out a sigh unconsciously when<n>our
sympathetic nervous system is in<n>control.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, you ask? Because our blood<n>vessels
contract in order to replace<n>low blood oxygen
levels.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And why is that? Because we are<n>stressed! That
means our bodies<n>tense up and make our breath
shallow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm, so what are you trying to say?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I simply mean to ask: are you well?<n>You are, after
all, a veritable and<n>valuable "well" of potential.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I really don't get you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Like, that time at the concert...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? I don't think I'm sick or<n>anything, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you feel something is amiss<n>with your
legs?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... But is that feeling danger,<n>or potential
that leads to dreams?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The answer... is both. Your speed<n>approaches an
unknown that no one<n>else has ever attained.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Should you attempt to reach the<n>domain that lies
beyond on your own,<n>you may exceed your
"limits."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...What does that mean?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I can see it now—you crossing that<n>line will be
disadvantageous for the<n>both of us.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now then, as a scientist, allow me topropose that you turn your attentionto concerts.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I joined the Grand Concert project<n>like you told
me to.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I still don't get it. I mean, concerts<n>are just...
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We do them to thank our fans for<n>supporting us in
our races.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I know they're a necessary part of<n>racing... but I
don't think they have<n>anything to do with my
running.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, but they do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know! Why don't you try talking<n>directly with
a fan sometime?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Who knows, you might learn a thing<n>or two,
including what concerts mean<n>to you.
